name: Janelise
message: From Philadelphia I seen your BF post about you and what your doing is incredible💕can’t wait to keep up with your journey and wish you safe travels ✨

name: Alicia
message: You doing your best and listen to your intuition at all times.

name: Ariana
message: Just came from your bf POV. Remember god never gives you more then you can handle. You’re making memories that will last a lifetime. This journey will not just benefit you but your relationship. If you can’t do this there won’t be anything that can stand in your way. Sending much love ❤️

name: Morgan
message: Tent setup looks great, seems like all that practice in the living room paid off!

name: Vida
message: You’re a baddie for even trying! Get some miles in! You’ve got this!!!

name: Rebecah Florence
message: You’ve got this, Laura!! We’re all cheering you on.

name: La-shea Slaydon
message: So excited for you!!!!  Cheering you on from Texas!!!

name: Laura
message: A fellow Laura and I live in Belfast, Maine! You got this! Excited to follow along, thanks for sharing!

name: Jon
message: Tip: Tuck the plastic under the tent so water does not pool on top of it. Hope you have a great hike.

name: Serena Hernandez
message: You can do anything! Sending all the luck from East TN (Great Smoky Mt Region)!

name: Abigail
message: Just saw your boyfriend’s post about your stellar journey! Sooooo stoked for you. This is such an incredible challenge to take on. Keep pushing!
